negative_memory.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday execution-path resilience rank over closed-bar favorable-before-adverse path, stop-before-target ambiguity, wick recovery, compression, spread-normalized excursion risk, session progress, day-position, and participation-stability features
negative_memory.next_boundary: C0049 R0001 shows the tested execution-path resilience surface is not a candidate as implemented; remaining C0049 variants would be adjacent tuning, so next work should choose a new major C0050 hypothesis without selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims
negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and all nine fold-isolated MT5 tick folds were negative

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 0 profitable and 9 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -322.07, and worst fold rw_009 net PnL -48.3.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by 43.6 total net PnL across 9 better and 0 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0049 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or execution-path feature nudge tuning

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday execution-path resilience rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: R0001 opens a new major C0049 surface focused on closed-bar proxies for stop-before-target ambiguity, favorable-before-adverse path quality, and tick-execution resilience after SC0009 retained candidate evidence but showed all-fold tick-worse divergence. It is not SC0009 mixed-evidence weight hardening, C0048 range-energy hardening, threshold, window, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, materialization, ONNX, or retry-only work.

notes: MT5 validation remains mandatory even if proxy KPI is weak.
Schedule replay is used only for paired validation and does not create runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live authority.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: The run changes the major question from source-schedule agreement or range-energy absorption to execution-path resilience and stop-before-target ambiguity avoidance. It does not adjust score thresholds, windows, stops, targets, hold times, sessions, activity filters, spread assumptions, capital sizing, materialization, ONNX, or retry a prior run.
pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: Tests whether closed-bar path-resilience features can select entries with less tick-execution erosion than prior candidate schedules, while still using fixed-lot proxy evidence and mandatory MT5 logic, tick, divergence, and fold-isolated closeout evidence.

notes: Proxy output is reference evidence and cannot stop MT5 validation.

feature.summary: closed M5 favorable-before-adverse path, adverse excursion containment, wick recovery, compression, spread-normalized excursion risk, session progress, day-range position, and participation-stability features

label.summary: directional target-first quality with explicit penalties for stop-before-target ambiguity, early adverse excursion, churn, giveback, and tick-execution fragility

trade_logic.summary: fixed-lot dual-direction top execution-path resilience candidates per active day with MT5 schedule replay validation
